testcase.name: test_create_catalog_item
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iteration13_features.py:24: in auth_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":[{"type":"model_attributes_type","loc":["body"],"msg":"Input should be a valid dictionary or object to extract fields from","input":"email=teste%40teste.com&password=12345","url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/model_attributes_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
